g.text: By the pressure formula, we can say that Smaller

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: contact area creates greater pressure under the

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: same force. Less area means more pressure

g.text: The deeper you go in a liquid, the greater the

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: pressure becomes. This explains why lower holes

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: in a bottle spray water farther.

g.text: Pressure affects many things in everyday life,

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: from water flow and hydraulic lifts to vehicle

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: tyres and walking on sand. Understanding pressure

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: helps us explain and design real-world solutions.
